languages.text: {n}Голос Ларии становится слабее и тише с каждой секундой.{/n} "Я долго мечтала сбежать из лап этой нечисти. Пять веков... заточения. И вот, наконец, этот момент настал. {n}Она переходит на еле слышный шепот.{/n} "Я отправляюсь к ледяным звездам, отец. Вместе с тобой". {n}Последняя искра жизни покидает взгляд раненой. Себериан в полной тишине протягивает ладонь и закрывает веки на мертвом лице дочери.{/n}

{n}Laria's voice grows weaker and quieter with each passing second.{/n} "I dreamed for so long of escaping the clutches of that filth. Five centuries... of captivity. And now, at last, that moment has come." {n}Her voice drops to a barely audible whisper.{/n} "I am journeying to the cold stars, Father. Together with you." {n}The last spark of life leaves the wounded woman's eyes. In complete silence, Seberian reaches out his hand and closes the eyelids on his daughter's still face.{/n}

И вот, наконец, этот момент настал. {n}Она переходит на еле слышный шепот.{/n} "Я отправляюсь к ледяным звездам, отец. Вместе с тобой". {n}Последняя искра жизни покидает взгляд раненой. languages.text: {n}菈丽雅的声音正随着时间流逝一点点变得微弱。{/n}“我梦想了那么久，想要逃离那污秽之物的魔爪。五个世纪……的囚禁。如今，这一刻终于到来。”{n}她的声音低沉微弱，几不可闻。{/n}“我要前往冰冷的星辰了，父亲。和您一起。”{n}受伤女人眼中最后一丝生命火花熄灭了。一片死寂中，塞贝里安伸出手，抚上女儿毫无生气的脸，合上了她的眼睑。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Laria's voice grows weaker and quieter with each passing second.{/n} "I dreamed for so long of escaping the clutches of that filth. Five centuries... of captivity. And now, at last, that moment has come." {n}Her voice drops to a barely audible whisper.{/n} "I am journeying to the cold stars, Father. Together with you." {n}The last spark of life leaves the wounded woman's eyes. In complete silence, Seberian reaches out his hand and closes the eyelids on his daughter's still face.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}菈丽雅的声音正随着时间流逝一点点变得微弱。{/n}“我梦想了那么久，想要逃离那污秽之物的魔爪。五个世纪……的囚禁。如今，这一刻终于到来。”{n}她的声音低沉微弱，几不可闻。{/n}“我要前往冰冷的星辰了，父亲。和您一起。”{n}受伤女人眼中最后一丝生命火花熄灭了。一片死寂中，塞贝里安伸出手，抚上女儿毫无生气的脸，合上了她的眼睑。{/n}

languages.text: {n}La voz de Laria se debilita a cada segundo que pasa.{/n} «He soñado tanto tiempo con escapar de las garras de esa escoria. Cinco siglos... de cautiverio. Y ahora, por fin ha llegado el momento». {n}Su voz se convierte en un susurro casi inaudible.{/n} «Me dirijo hacia las frías estrellas, padre. Contigo». {n}La última chispa de vida abandona los ojos de la mujer herida. Sin decir nada, Seberian alarga la mano y los cierra.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Laria's voice grows weaker and quieter with each passing second.{/n} "I dreamed for so long of escaping the clutches of that filth. Five centuries... of captivity. And now, at last, that moment has come." {n}Her voice drops to a barely audible whisper.{/n} "I am journeying to the cold stars, Father. Together with you." {n}The last spark of life leaves the wounded woman's eyes. In complete silence, Seberian reaches out his hand and closes the eyelids on his daughter's still face.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}La voz de Laria se debilita a cada segundo que pasa.{/n} «He soñado tanto tiempo con escapar de las garras de esa escoria. Cinco siglos... de cautiverio. Y ahora, por fin ha llegado el momento». {n}Su voz se convierte en un susurro casi inaudible.{/n} «Me dirijo hacia las frías estrellas, padre. Contigo». {n}La última chispa de vida abandona los ojos de la mujer herida. Sin decir nada, Seberian alarga la mano y los cierra.{/n}

languages.text: {n}La voix de Laria s'atténue à mesure qu'elle parle :{/n} « J'ai rêvé si longtemps d'échapper aux griffes de cette ignoble engeance. Cinq siècles... de captivité. Et maintenant, le moment est enfin venu. » {n}Sa voix se réduit à un murmure à peine audible.{/n} « Je m'en vais vers les étoiles glacées, père. Avec vous. » {n}La dernière étincelle de vie quitte les yeux de Laria. Sans prononcer un mot, Seberian tend la main et effleure le visage immobile de sa fille pour clore ses paupières.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Laria's voice grows weaker and quieter with each passing second.{/n} "I dreamed for so long of escaping the clutches of that filth. Five centuries... of captivity. And now, at last, that moment has come." {n}Her voice drops to a barely audible whisper.{/n} "I am journeying to the cold stars, Father. Together with you." {n}The last spark of life leaves the wounded woman's eyes. In complete silence, Seberian reaches out his hand and closes the eyelids on his daughter's still face.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}La voix de Laria s'atténue à mesure qu'elle parle :{/n} « J'ai rêvé si longtemps d'échapper aux griffes de cette ignoble engeance. Cinq siècles... de captivité. Et maintenant, le moment est enfin venu. » {n}Sa voix se réduit à un murmure à peine audible.{/n} « Je m'en vais vers les étoiles glacées, père. Avec vous. » {n}La dernière étincelle de vie quitte les yeux de Laria. Sans prononcer un mot, Seberian tend la main et effleure le visage immobile de sa fille pour clore ses paupières.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Laria'nın sesi her geçen saniye zayıflayıp suskunlaşıyor.{/n} "O pisliğin pençelerinden kurtulmayı o kadar uzun zamandır hayal ediyordum ki. Beş asırlık... Esaret. Sonunda o an geldi." {n}Sesi, zor duyulan bir fısıltıya düşüyor.{/n} "Soğuk yıldızlara yolculuk ediyorum baba. Seninle birlikte." {n}Hayatın son kıvılcımı, yaralı kadının gözlerini terk ediyor. Tam bir sessizlik içinde Seberian, elini uzatıyor ve kızının hareketsiz yüzündeki göz kapaklarını kapatıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Laria's voice grows weaker and quieter with each passing second.{/n} "I dreamed for so long of escaping the clutches of that filth. Five centuries... of captivity. And now, at last, that moment has come." {n}Her voice drops to a barely audible whisper.{/n} "I am journeying to the cold stars, Father. Together with you." {n}The last spark of life leaves the wounded woman's eyes. In complete silence, Seberian reaches out his hand and closes the eyelids on his daughter's still face.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Laria'nın sesi her geçen saniye zayıflayıp suskunlaşıyor.{/n} "O pisliğin pençelerinden kurtulmayı o kadar uzun zamandır hayal ediyordum ki. Beş asırlık... Esaret. Sonunda o an geldi." {n}Sesi, zor duyulan bir fısıltıya düşüyor.{/n} "Soğuk yıldızlara yolculuk ediyorum baba. Seninle birlikte." {n}Hayatın son kıvılcımı, yaralı kadının gözlerini terk ediyor. Tam bir sessizlik içinde Seberian, elini uzatıyor ve kızının hareketsiz yüzündeki göz kapaklarını kapatıyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Larias Stimme wird mit jeder Sekunde, die vergeht, schwächer und leiser.{/n} "Ich habe so lange davon geträumt, den Fängen dieses Abschaums zu entgehen. Fünf Jahrhunderte ... in Gefangenschaft. Und nun ist dieser Moment endlich gekommen." {n}Ihre Stimme ist nun nur noch ein kaum hörbares Flüstern.{/n} "Ich reise zu den kalten Sternen, Vater. An Eurer Seite." {n}Der letzte Funke Leben weicht aus den Augen der Verwundeten. Seberian schließt schweigend die Augenlider seiner toten Tochter.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Laria's voice grows weaker and quieter with each passing second.{/n} "I dreamed for so long of escaping the clutches of that filth. Five centuries... of captivity. And now, at last, that moment has come." {n}Her voice drops to a barely audible whisper.{/n} "I am journeying to the cold stars, Father. Together with you." {n}The last spark of life leaves the wounded woman's eyes. In complete silence, Seberian reaches out his hand and closes the eyelids on his daughter's still face.{/n}

Fünf Jahrhunderte ... in Gefangenschaft. Und nun ist dieser Moment endlich gekommen." {n}Ihre Stimme ist nun nur noch ein kaum hörbares Flüstern.{/n} "Ich reise zu den kalten Sternen, Vater. An Eurer Seite." {n}Der letzte Funke Leben weicht aus den Augen der Verwundeten. Seberian schließt schweigend die Augenlider seiner toten Tochter.{/n}

languages.text: {n}ラリアの声は、時と共に弱く静かになっていく。{/n}「長い間、その汚物から逃れる夢を見ていた。五百年…捕らわれの身。そしてついに、その瞬間が来た。」{n}彼女の声は、かすかに聞こえるまで弱まっていた。{/n}「私は、冷たい星々へと旅立つ。あなたと共に。」{n}傷ついた女の目に、最後の生命の光が消えていく。静寂の中で、セベリアンは手を伸ばし、娘の静かな顔に、目を閉じる。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Laria's voice grows weaker and quieter with each passing second.{/n} "I dreamed for so long of escaping the clutches of that filth. Five centuries... of captivity. And now, at last, that moment has come." {n}Her voice drops to a barely audible whisper.{/n} "I am journeying to the cold stars, Father. Together with you." {n}The last spark of life leaves the wounded woman's eyes. In complete silence, Seberian reaches out his hand and closes the eyelids on his daughter's still face.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}ラリアの声は、時と共に弱く静かになっていく。{/n}「長い間、その汚物から逃れる夢を見ていた。五百年…捕らわれの身。そしてついに、その瞬間が来た。」{n}彼女の声は、かすかに聞こえるまで弱まっていた。{/n}「私は、冷たい星々へと旅立つ。あなたと共に。」{n}傷ついた女の目に、最後の生命の光が消えていく。静寂の中で、セベリアンは手を伸ばし、娘の静かな顔に、目を閉じる。{/n}
